faqs.question: what should i expect from a lesson?
faqs.answer: every lesson is tailored to your goals. we'll work on technique, song interpretation, and building confidence in your voice.

faqs.question: do i need experience to start?
faqs.answer: not at all! i work with beginners through advanced singers. the free intro lesson helps us figure out where you are and where you want to go.

faqs.question: can i take lessons virtually?
faqs.answer: yes! i offer both in-person (alexandria, va) and virtual lessons via zoom.

faqs.question: what is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: please give at least 24 hours notice. late cancellations or no-shows may be charged the full lesson rate.
